name: a stack-declared namespace with a committed posture flows end-to-end through translate into the recommended option
command: grep -qE 'probes_consumed=[1-9]' t.err && grep -q 'recommended=opt-max' r.err && ruby -rjson -e 'exit(JSON.parse(File.read("req.json"))["pillars"].values.flatten.map{|x|x["concern"]}.include?("multi_region") ? 0:1)' && echo stack-flows-end-to-end 1>&2
setup: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answers p.json --stack-add aws --probe-answer aws:aws_region_strategy=multi-region --partial --out prof.json --now 2026-07-08T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
